content: With Chris on PTO and Nick missing the next 2 meetings, should the next 2 be cancelled? I can certainly run the meeting but in terms of design discussion I'm not sure it's possible to do it with y'all 2 missing. This would mainly impact the arm32 agenda item, but that seems like it especially wants y'all both to weigh in.
(sounds fine to the ghost of cfallin)
@fitzgen (he/him) assuming you agree, could you cancel via the calendar invite? I think you're the owner on that one right?
I can make some PRs to shuffle agenda items once done
